title: Combat/floor oracle both-sides live capture blocked by parallel-agent toolchain contention (FID-0032 landed not verified)
repro: cmake configure stalled (0 CPU, no CMakeCache after 20min) under concurrent sibling-agent builds; ares rebuild is slow/fragile per plan

history.note: Native emitter compiles clean (-fsyntax-only OK) and ares patch is bash -n clean; verified milestone needs one native trace + one ares trace through compare_combat_trace.py. Retest when the build environment is uncontended.

RESOLVED: both-sides live capture completed uncontended — ares rebuilt with combat-oracle patch (incremental from existing checkout), native built clean in /tmp (cmake did not hang outside the worktree overlay FS). FID-0032 -> verified. The landed infra also needed two additions the verify surfaced: --native-full-trace (movement_oracle_capture.sh; flow-only trace omitted combat_oracle) and --align move (compare_combat_trace.py; native direct-boot vs ares menu-boot cannot align by absolute g_GlobalTimer). Both landed 460b80e/49df4c8 and are the documented recipe.
